framing.text: These are cosmetic, appearance-based suggestions only — not medical advice and not a diagnosis (SkinScan decision D-002). Concerns are described by how they look in a photo. Prescription-strength options exist for many of these concerns; a doctor or dermatologist can advise on and prescribe them.

routines.title: Comprehensive

triage.see_doctor_note: These routines are safe to start, but a professional review is recommended for the number or severity of detected lesions, possible scarring, persistent dark-spot concerns. The analysis also noticed a spot it cannot assess (nevus_observation) — worth showing to a doctor.
